title: Decor and more
description: Adds cool decoration blocks to spice up your builds
body:
A Minecraft Decor Mod that adds a collection of building blocks with themes to make many fantastic builds.

This mod has complete vanilla compatibility

Building blocks added consists of smooth solid color blocks, 

future additions to this mod will be blocks with futuristic designs, blocks with gradients, and many blocks that would be used in a factory, new blocks coming with be slopes and vertical slabs, Fences and/or walls with be able to be crafted with each block variant.
